flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Concordia University Texas fell 31% between 2021 and 2024 (1.7k → 1.2k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Concordia University Texas fell 32% between 2021 and 2024 ($34.5k → $23.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Concordia University Texas fell 32% between 2021 and 2024 ($34.5k → $23.5k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Concordia University Texas rose 19% between 2021 and 2024 (37.4% → 44.6%).
